properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What a miracle when two hearts find to each other. What a miracle when a stranger becomes a lover. How fine it is when we find this might last forever. How great love is!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What a miracle when mine and yours turn to our. What a miracle when two worlds crash to one by that power. How fine it is when we find this is something higher. How great love is!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love is a fire, burnes up your heart. Love lifts you higer, lights every part. Love is a fire, love is a flame. Love has a name: God is love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What a miracle when two ways melt to one only. What a miracle when a promise means: Yes to you, totally! How fine it is when we find this is how it's meant to be. How great love is!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let the one who is perfect love fill you up! He's the fire that never stops, loves you from toe to top. Through his fire you are able to burn, love in return.
